title: Sad Emoji & Kaomoji: Copy & Paste 😢 Sad Face Combos
meta_description: Sad emoji 😢 😔 for melancholy bios and captions, heartbroken 💔 combo sets, and down-mood kaomoji like (μ_μ) in one library. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Melancholy faces, heartbreak symbols, and gloomy kaomoji for sad bios, captions, and late-night posts. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: A sad emoji says what a paragraph can't — 😢 for a single tear, 😔 for quiet pensiveness, 💔 for outright heartbreak. This library covers the whole melancholy spectrum: classic sad faces, wilted-rose heartbreak symbols beloved by sad-aesthetic bios, drained and disappointed expressions, and downcast kaomoji like (μ_μ). For full-on sobbing and tears, head to the crying emoji page instead.
